name: idlewuxia

scripts.task:preflight: npm run baseline:test && npm run production:test && npm run production:validate && npm run web:freshness:test && npm run apk:traceability:test && npm run runtime:compatibility:test && npm run runtime:condition-contract:test && npm run runtime:result-preparation:test && npm run runtime:result-effect-executor:test && npm run runtime:navigation-service:test && npm run runtime:entity-interaction-service:test && npm run runtime:chapter-session:test && npm run runtime:ui-flow-adapter:test && npm run runtime:persistence:test && npm run runtime:integrity:test && npm run runtime:choice-result:test && npm run runtime:evidence-contract:test && npm run runtime:entity-reachability:test && npm run runtime:action-state-assertions:test && npm run runtime:condition-negative && npm run runtime:first-session-simulator:test && npm run scope:validate && npm run android:identity && npm run wuxia:validate:active-entry && npm run wuxia:validate:evidence && npm run wuxia:validate:first-session:runtime
scripts.check: npm run task:preflight && npm run wuxia:validate:first-session && npm run wuxia:test:first-session-interactions
scripts.check:legacy-novalite: npm run validate && npm run validate:reference-parity && npm run validate:unlock-gates && npm run validate:combat-readability && npm run validate:combat-presentation && npm run validate:presentation-config && npm run validate:combat-mechanics && npm run validate:mobile-shell && npm run simulate && npm run audit:p1p2 && npm run audit:reference-consistency && npm run audit:main-function-parity && npm run validate:monetization && npm run validate:audit && npm run validate:runtime-capture
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:web && cap sync android && npm run web:freshness
scripts.wuxia:check: npm run validate && npm run simulate && npm run wuxia:validate:first-session && npm run wuxia:simulate:first-session && npm run wuxia:audit:sources
scripts.wuxia:sync:all: npm run wuxia:sync:combat-action-policies && npm run wuxia:sync:hangup-reward-class && npm run wuxia:sync:fb01-npc-actions && npm run wuxia:sync:fb01-result-args && npm run wuxia:sync:fb01-chapter-clear
scripts.wuxia:check:fast: npm run validate && npm run wuxia:validate:active-entry && npm run wuxia:validate:evidence && npm run wuxia:validate:first-session && npm run runtime:condition-contract:test && npm run runtime:result-preparation:test && npm run runtime:result-effect-executor:test && npm run runtime:navigation-service:test && npm run runtime:entity-interaction-service:test && npm run runtime:chapter-session:test && npm run runtime:ui-flow-adapter:test && npm run runtime:integrity:test && npm run runtime:choice-result:test && npm run runtime:evidence-contract:test && npm run runtime:entity-reachability:test && npm run runtime:action-state-assertions:test && npm run runtime:condition-negative && npm run runtime:first-session-simulator:test && npm run wuxia:simulate:first-session && npm run wuxia:test:first-session-interactions && npm run wuxia:audit:fb01-interactions && npm run wuxia:audit:entity-reachability && npm run wuxia:audit:fb01-result-tokens && npm run wuxia:audit:flow-parity && npm run wuxia:audit:p2-closure && npm run wuxia:audit:content-boundary
scripts.wuxia:release-gate: npm run wuxia:check:fast && npm run wuxia:audit:online-standard

description: Data-driven vertical Wuxia idle RPG with an isolated HTML/Capacitor shipping runtime.
